name: Routine Dental Care
description: Regular check-ups, professional cleaning and preventive guidance for healthier smiles.

name: Root Canal Treatment
description: Clear explanations and comfort-focused treatment planning for damaged or infected teeth.

name: Smile Improvement
description: Personalised options for whitening, alignment and cosmetic improvements after consultation.

name: Children's Dentistry
description: Patient, friendly visits designed to help young patients feel calm and understood.

name: Dental Implants
description: Consultation-led replacement options for missing teeth, based on individual suitability.

name: Urgent Dental Visits
description: Prompt assessment for tooth pain, broken teeth and other urgent dental concerns.
